name: Archon of the Void
description: A towering entity of living darkness that defies comprehension. Its form constantly shifts between nightmarish shapes - tentacles, wings, claws, mouths filled with impossible teeth. Hundreds of eyes open and close across its surface like dying stars. This is the herald and champion of the Void Prince, a being of pure entropy given form.

attacks.name: Void Tendrils
attacks.description: Writhing tentacles of pure void energy that corrupt everything they touch

attacks.name: Reality Tear
attacks.description: Tears a hole in reality itself, dealing massive void damage

attacks.name: Void Bolt
attacks.description: A bolt of concentrated void energy

attacks.name: Entropy Wave
attacks.description: A wave of destructive void energy that affects all enemies in a cone

movement.notes: Can move through obstacles. Reality bends around it.

special_abilities.name: Void Aura
special_abilities.description: All enemies within 3 tiles take 1d4 void damage at the start of each turn

special_abilities.name: Reality Distortion
special_abilities.description: The Archon's presence warps reality - critical hits against it have a 50% chance to fail

special_abilities.name: Summon Void Spawn
special_abilities.description: When HP drops below 50%, summons 2 lesser void spawns

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance
special_abilities.description: Can choose to succeed on a failed saving throw (3/day)

special_abilities.name: Void Touch
special_abilities.description: Attacks may inflict void corruption, reducing max HP by 1d4 until long rest

behavior.notes: Epic boss-tier enemy. Uses Void Bolt for single targets, Entropy Wave for groups, Reality Tear for high-priority threats. Ignores friendly fire completely. Will summon reinforcements when wounded. Extremely intelligent and ruthless.
